name: vibe-remote
description: Your AI agent army, commanded from Slack/Discord/Wechat/Lark. Stream Claude Code, OpenCode, or Codex in real-time — from anywhere.
summaryZh: Your AI agent army, commanded from Slack/Discord/Wechat/Lark. Stream Claude Code, OpenCode, or Codex in real-time — from anywhere. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
